pages.title: About Dr Simon Opher MP - Dr Simon Opher MP
pages.meta_description: Dr Simon Opher was elected to Parliament in 2024. Prior to becoming an MP, he was a local GP for 30 years.
pages.text_excerpt: About Dr Simon Opher MP - Dr Simon Opher MP Simon Opher Home About Gallery News & Updates Stroud Simon in the News Simon Says, Let’s Talk Newsletters Parliamentary Updates ↗ Voting record ↗ Early Day Motions ↗ Spoken contributions ↗ Written questions Help & Advice Contact ↗ Facebook ↗ Instagram ↗ Bluesky About Me I have been a local GP for 30 years and chair the Stroud Locality NHS. In my time as a GP, I have first-hand experience of how disparities in income affect peoples’ lives. In Stroud, the wealthiest people live, on average, more than nine years longer than the poorest. The solution to this isn’t medical – it’s political. Play Since having been elected to Parliament in 2024 I have been championing causes close to my heart such as rebuilding our NHS, meeting our climate commitments and supporting local services. I sit on a number of All-Party Parliamentary Groups (APPGs), and am Chair of the groups on Health, Beyond Pills, and Creative Health. I am also the Vice-Chair of the Net Zero APPG. I continue to practice as a GP when time allows. You can read more about my work in Parliament via the links below. ↗ Contact information ↗ Voting record ↗ Early Day Motions ↗ Spoken contributions ↗ Written questions © 2026 Simon Opher · Privacy Policy Facebook Instagram Bluesky

pages.title: Contact Dr Simon Opher MP - Dr Simon Opher MP
pages.meta_description: If you are a Stroud constituent and would like to contact me about an issue or a query, please email simon.opher.mp@parliament.uk or call 01453 621304.
pages.text_excerpt: Contact Dr Simon Opher MP - Dr Simon Opher MP Simon Opher Home About Gallery News & Updates Stroud Simon in the News Simon Says, Let’s Talk Newsletters Parliamentary Updates ↗ Voting record ↗ Early Day Motions ↗ Spoken contributions ↗ Written questions Help & Advice Contact ↗ Facebook ↗ Instagram ↗ Bluesky Contact Me If you are a Stroud constituent and would like to contact me about an issue or a query, please email me directly , use the form below, or call 01453 621304 to speak to a member of my constituency office team. Due to strict parliamentary protocol, I am only able to deal with casework from Stroud constituents. As a general rule I do not sign mass letters or petitions unless they relate to an area of expertise or particular interest. If I am going to commit to a cause, I want to do it properly. You can check who your MP is here . Please include any relevant case reference numbers in any written communication. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.
